entries.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
entries.description: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

entries.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
entries.description: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

entries.title: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
entries.description: Elon Musk's tech company released the newest version of Grok on Wednesday, promising a cheaper, more efficient alternative to other powerful AI models.

entries.title: This startup thinks robotics is about to have its ChatGPT moment
entries.description: General Intuition is betting millions of hours of video game data can train the foundation models for physical AI, making it easier to build smarter robots with minimal real-world data.

entries.title: Google Photos adds a new AI ‘Video Remix’ tool
entries.description: The feature can do things like apply cinematic relighting to brighten up a dark clip, swap out a plain background for something fun, or add artistic styles to videos.

entries.title: Why this CEO thinks video games make better training data than the internet
entries.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at und

entries.title: Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
entries.description: Meta is adding a new safeguard to stop people from secretly recording others with its AI glasses. But the update comes as the company continues to expand how much personal data its AI products collect

entries.title: OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
entries.description: OpenAI says its new voice mode can speak and listen at the same time, a key ability for live translation.

entries.title: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A to help enterprises build their own AI agents
entries.description: Founded in 2024, Prime Intellect’s goal is to give organizations capabilities to train their own agentic systems without relying on frontier AI labs.

entries.title: These AI startups are growing  revenue at faster and faster rates
entries.description: There are a lot of fast-growing AI startups, but some are growing even faster, they say.

entries.title: Your gaming data could be the secret to AGI, according to this Bezos-backed startup
entries.description: When it comes to achieving artificial general intelligence (AGI), large language models just don’t have what it takes. Models like ChatGPT and Claude are great at text, but they’re less skilled at und

entries.title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
entries.description: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.

entries.title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
entries.description: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

entries.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
entries.description: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11 billion valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.

entries.title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
entries.description: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising and decorating, and creator-based opportunities.

entries.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
entries.description: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

entries.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
entries.description: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.

entries.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
entries.description: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.

entries.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
entries.description: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

entries.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
entries.description: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.
